product_overview: ShiftPro is a single-page attendance tracking app for employees to clock in and out, log special day types, and review shift history. It also lets users configure work-location geofencing, shift thresholds, and app preferences from a built-in settings area.
core_goals: Clock into and out of shifts to track worked time
Record special attendance statuses such as sick leave, vacation, overtime, and remote work
Configure workplace location, geofence radius, and shift threshold times
Customize app preferences like location detection, notifications, vibration, theme, and language
Review current, monthly, and daily attendance history

features.name: Bottom Navigation
features.description: Lets the user switch between the main sections of the app: Dashboard, Settings, and Logs.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select the Dashboard section -> See the dashboard content become active -> Select the Settings section -> See the settings content become active -> Select the Logs section -> See the logs content become active
Navigate to / -> Select the Logs section -> Observe the logs/history view and active tab state

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Lets the user switch the app between light and dark appearance modes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle the theme setting -> Observe the interface switch between dark and light mode
Navigate to / -> Toggle the theme setting again -> Observe the interface return to the previous appearance mode

features.name: Language/Locale Toggle
features.description: Lets the user switch the interface language between English and Arabic, including text direction.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle the language setting -> Observe the interface language and text direction switch between English and Arabic
Navigate to / -> Toggle the language setting again -> Observe the interface return to the previous language and direction

features.name: Clock In / Clock Out
features.description: Lets the user start and end a shift while the app tracks elapsed time and stores attendance records.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> Start a shift -> Observe the button state change to clocked-in mode -> Watch the live timer begin counting up -> End the shift -> Observe the shift stop and the timer reset
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Start a shift -> End the shift -> Navigate to /#logs -> Observe the completed shift appear in history

features.name: Quick Log Actions
features.description: Lets the user record special attendance day types with a single action.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> Record sick leave -> Navigate to /#logs -> Observe a sick entry in the history
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Record vacation -> Observe the attendance entry is saved as vacation
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Record overtime -> Observe the attendance entry is saved as overtime
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Record remote work -> Observe the attendance entry is saved as remote

features.name: Live Shift Timer
features.description: Shows a running elapsed-time display after the user clocks in.
user_flows: Navigate to /#dashboard -> Start a shift -> Observe the timer begin updating every second while the shift remains active
Navigate to /#dashboard -> Start a shift -> Wait while the timer updates continuously -> End the shift -> Observe the timer stop updating

features.name: Geofence Configuration
features.description: Lets the user define workplace coordinates and a geofence radius for location-based attendance behavior.
user_flows: Navigate to /#settings -> Enter latitude, longitude, and radius values -> Save the location settings -> Observe the geofence configuration is retained
Navigate to /#settings -> Detect current location -> Observe the coordinates auto-fill from the browser location service -> Save the location settings
Navigate to /#settings -> Enter location values that are outside expected bounds -> Attempt to save the location settings -> Observe validation feedback for the invalid input

features.name: Shift Threshold Configuration
features.description: Lets the user customize start and end times for three shift windows.
user_flows: Navigate to /#settings -> Change the start and end times for the shift windows -> Save the threshold settings -> Observe the updated schedule is retained
Navigate to /#settings -> Adjust the shift times again -> Save the threshold settings -> Observe the new shift windows are applied

features.name: User Preferences
features.description: Lets the user control app behavior such as automatic location detection, notifications, and vibration on clock in or out.
user_flows: Navigate to /#settings -> Turn automatic location detection on or off -> Observe the preference state change
Navigate to /#settings -> Turn notifications on or off -> Observe the preference state change
Navigate to /#settings -> Turn vibration on clock in or out on or off -> Observe the preference state change

features.name: Shift Logs History
features.description: Lets the user review monthly attendance totals and a daily history table of recorded shifts and log types.
user_flows: Navigate to /#logs -> View the monthly summary totals -> Review the daily history table with date, shift, in, out, and total information
Navigate to /#logs -> Review the monthly overview statistics -> Scroll through the daily history table to inspect past attendance entries

tech_stack.other: IndexedDB, Service Worker, Web Geolocation API, PWA Manifest

routes.description: Single-page application with tab-based navigation (Dashboard, Settings, Logs)
Dashboard tab showing current shift status, live timer, quick actions, and weekly summary
Settings tab for configuring geofence coordinates, shift thresholds, and preferences
Logs tab showing monthly overview and daily history table

features.name: Bottom Navigation
features.description: Tab-based navigation between Dashboard, Settings, and Logs sections
user_interactions: Click Dashboard tab to view dashboard section
Click Settings tab to view settings section
Click Logs tab to view logs/history section
Observe active tab highlights correctly

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Toggle between dark and light themes, persisted via localStorage
user_interactions: Click the moon/sun icon button in the header to toggle theme
Observe page switches between dark and light mode

features.name: Language/Locale Toggle
features.description: Toggle between English (LTR) and Arabic (RTL) languages, persisted via localStorage
user_interactions: Click the globe icon button in the header to toggle between EN and AR
Observe page language and text direction switch

features.name: Clock In / Clock Out
features.description: Allows user to clock in or clock out, recording shift start/end times and computing total hours via IndexedDB
user_interactions: Click the Clock In / Clock Out button on the Dashboard
Observe the button label switches between Clock In and Clock Out
Observe timer starts counting up after clock-in

features.name: Quick Log Actions
features.description: Log special day types (Sick Leave, Vacation, Overtime, Remote) with a single button tap
user_interactions: Click Sick Leave button in Quick Log section
Click Vacation button in Quick Log section
Click Overtime button in Quick Log section
Click Remote button in Quick Log section

features.name: Live Shift Timer
features.description: Displays a running clock showing hours worked since last clock-in
user_interactions: View the timer display on the dashboard updating every second after clocking in

features.name: Geofence Configuration
features.description: Configure workplace GPS coordinates (lat/lng) and geofence radius in the Settings tab
user_interactions: Enter latitude value in the lat input
Enter longitude value in the lng input
Enter radius value in the radius input
Click Detect Current Location to auto-fill coordinates via browser geolocation
Click Save Location to persist coordinates to localStorage

features.name: Shift Threshold Configuration
features.description: Configure custom start/end times for Shift 1, Shift 2, and Shift 3 in Settings
user_interactions: Change Shift 1 start time input
Change Shift 1 end time input
Change Shift 2 start time input
Change Shift 2 end time input
Change Shift 3 start time input
Change Shift 3 end time input
Click Save Thresholds button to persist shift times

features.name: User Preferences
features.description: Toggle switches for auto-detect location, notifications, and vibrate on clock in/out
user_interactions: Toggle the Auto-detect location switch on/off
Toggle the Notifications switch on/off
Toggle the Vibrate on clock in/out switch on/off

features.name: Shift Logs History
features.description: View monthly overview (total hours, days worked, vacation left) and daily history table
user_interactions: Navigate to the Logs tab
View monthly overview stats (Total Hours, Days Worked, Vacation Left)
View daily history table with Date, Shift, In, Out, Total columns

known_limitations.issue: Geofence auto-detection requires browser geolocation permission; may be blocked in test environment
known_limitations.impact: Location-based auto clock-in/out cannot be verified without geolocation permission

known_limitations.issue: Push notifications require service worker permission grant
known_limitations.impact: Notification tests may fail if permission is denied in browser

known_limitations.issue: Static HTML with placeholder data (timer shows 06:32:14, weekly stats are hardcoded)
known_limitations.impact: Dynamic data display depends on IndexedDB records that may not exist in fresh test environment
